title: Zapatlela
subTitle: Tatya Vinchu, a gangster, learns a voodoo spell to transfer his soul into any living or nonliving thing. He dies and transfers his consciousness into a doll, waiting to come alive in a human body.

title: De Dhakka
subTitle: Sayali, an aspiring dancer, gets a chance to be a part of a prestigious dance competition in Mumbai. Her family opposes the idea of travelling so far but undertake the journey to earn the prize money.

subTitle: Lakshya discovers a small bottle, in which his look-alike, Gangaram, is trapped. He goes through a series of problems in the process of freeing him.

title: Mann Mandira
subTitle: Join us for a Marathi devotional show filled with heartfelt keertan and worship, where devotees come together to celebrate and connect with the divine in a joyous atmosphere.

title: Jai Malhar
subTitle: The reincarnation of Lord Shiva, Lord Khandoba, rules over the hearts of his devotees who revere him dearly. He soon becomes famous for his magnanimity, valour and power.

title: Dashavatar
subTitle: Two children narrate the story of Lord Vishnu and his ten incarnations who have constantly fought and emerged victorious over any evil that may exist.

title: Chandramukhi
subTitle: Emerging politician Daulat Rao falls for the captivating Tamasha artist, Chandramukhi. Soon, their illicit encounter dramatically alters their lives, leading to widespread repercussions.
